name: Hawaiian Electric (HECO/MECO/HELCO)
notes: SCAFFOLD: ODIN has zero Hawaii coverage and HECO's feed is auth-gated (JWT from a pre-shared key) + origin-locked. Enable by deploying workers/heco-proxy.mjs with a HECO-issued HECO_ACCESS_KEY (then set config.proxyUrl or run the collector with the env secret) and flipping disabled=false. Until then this is skipped.
